title: alangium javanicum
intro: Alangium javanicum, also known as the Java alangium or javan alangium, is a plant species in the family Alangiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Alangium javanicum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Alangium javanicum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and infusions.
